subcodes.first_line: The One Friend, in the prison of enemies, remaineth occupied with remembrance and praise, having no purpose save reformation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست یکتا در سجن اعدا بذکر و ثنا مشغول مقصودی جز اصلاح
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat], @universal peace; world unity, @prayer for protection
